ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Employee's last name */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Employee's first name */,
  "title" TEXT /* Employee's job title */,
  "title_of_courtesy" TEXT /* Courtesy title for the employee */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Employee's birth date */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "address" TEXT /* Employee's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employee resides */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the employee resides */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the employee's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the employee resides */,
  "home_phone" TEXT /* Employee's home phone number */,
  "extension" TEXT /* Employee's phone extension at work */,
  "photo" TEXT /* Path to the employee's photo */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the employee */,
  "reports_to" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor */,
  "photo_path" TEXT /* URL to the employee's photo */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Status of the employee */,
  "job_category" TEXT /* Category of the employee's job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained */,
  "year_obtained" INTEGER /* Year the degree was obtained */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major or field of study */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Specific field of study */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Employee's GPA during their academic program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "issuing_organization" TEXT /* Organization that issued the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  "certification_type" TEXT /* Type of certification */,
  "renewal_required" INTEGER /* Whether the certification requires renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Level of proficiency in the language */,
  "language_category" TEXT /* Category of the language */,
  "reading_proficiency" TEXT /* Level of reading proficiency in the language */,
  "writing_proficiency" TEXT /* Level of writing proficiency in the language */,
  "speaking_proficiency" TEXT /* Level of speaking proficiency in the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employment period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employment period */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title held during the employment period */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the employee worked */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the previous job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating received in the performance review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document */,
  "document_category" TEXT /* Category of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the security role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security role */,
  "role_category" TEXT /* Category of the security role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the security role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES security_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
